metadata.description: All-the-things: request completions on every document type at meaningful positions.

diagnostics.message: Expected an operand. The formula or expression expects a valid operand. For example, you can add the operand '2' to the expression ' 1 +_' so that the result is '3'. Or, you can add the operand "there" to the expression '"Hi "& _ ' so that the result is 'Hi there'.
